name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Forks: a sequence of N elements, each either 0 (free) or 1 (held) *)
(* States: a sequence of N elements, each either "thinking", "hungry", or "eating" *)

(* Helper functions *)
LEFT(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RIGHT(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* Initial state: all forks free, all philosophers thinking *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Action: philosopher i picks up left fork *)
PickLeft(i) == /\ forks[i] = 0
              /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 1]
              /\ UNCHANGED states

(* Action: philosopher i picks up right fork *)
PickRight(i) == /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = 0
               /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![RIGHT(i)] = 1]
               /\ UNCHANGED states

(* Action: philosopher i puts down left fork *)
PutLeft(i) == /\ forks[i] = 1
             /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
             /\ UNCHANGED states

(* Action: philosopher i puts down right fork *)
PutRight(i) == /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = 1
              /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![RIGHT(i)] = 0]
              /\ UNCHANGED states

(* Action: philosopher i starts eating *)
StartEating(i) == /\ states[i] = "hungry"
                 /\ forks[i] = 1
                 /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = 1
                 /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
                 /\ UNCHANGED forks

(* Action: philosopher i stops eating *)
StopEating(i) == /\ states[i] = "eating"
                /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
                /\ UNCHANGED forks

(* Action: philosopher i becomes hungry *)
BecomeHungry(i) == /\ states[i] = "thinking"
                  /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
                  /\ UNCHANGED forks

(* Next-state relation: any philosopher can pick up or put down forks, or change state *)
Next == \/ \E i \in 1..N : PickLeft(i)
      \/ \E i \in 1..N : PickRight(i)
      \/ \E i \in 1..N : PutLeft(i)
      \/ \E i \in 1..N : PutRight(i)
      \/ \E i \in 1..N : StartEating(i)
      \/ \E i \in 1..N : StopEating(i)
      \/ \E i \in 1..N : BecomeHungry(i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y

VARIABLES num, flag, maxNum

Init == /\ num = <<>>
       /\ flag = <<>>
       /\ maxNum = 0

Next == /\ num' = Append(num, 0)
       /\ flag' = Append(flag, FALSE)
       /\ maxNum' = IF maxNum = 0 THEN 0 ELSE maxNum + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag, maxNum>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

Init == /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 0
        /\ tail = 0
        /\ count = 0

ProducerAction == /\ count < K
                 /\ head' = head
                 /\ tail' = (tail + 1) \mod K
                 /\ q' = Append(q, head)
                 /\ count' = count + 1

ConsumerAction == /\ count > 0
                 /\ head' = (head + 1) \mod K
                 /\ tail' = tail
                 /\ q' = Tail(q)
                 /\ count' = count - 1

Next == ProducerAction \/ ConsumerAction

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

TypeOK == /\ K \in Nat
          /\ q \in Seq(0..K-1)
          /\ head \in 0..K-1
          /\ tail \in 0..K-1
          /\ count \in 0..K

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active, r

Init == /\ readers = <<>>  /\ writer_active = 0

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = 0
        /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \notin readers
           /\ r' \in 1..10
           /\ r' \notin readers
           /\ writer_active' = writer_active
           /\ readers' = Append(readers, r)
        \/ /\ writer_active = 0
           /\ \A r \in readers : r' = r
           /\ writer_active' = 1
        \/ /\ writer_active = 1
           /\ \A r \in readers : r' = r
           /\ writer_active' = 0
           /\ readers' = <<>>
        \/ /\ writer_active = 1
           /\ \E r \in readers : /\ r' \in 1..10
              /\ r' \notin readers
              /\ writer_active' = writer_active
              /\ readers' = Append(Tail(readers), r')

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ChandyLamportSnapshot ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state, channel, snapshot, marker
TypeOK ==
  /\ state \in [1..N -> Nat]
  /\ channel \in [1..N -> [1..N -> Seq(Nat)]]
  /\ snapshot \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]
  /\ marker \in [1..N -> [1..N -> Seq(BOOLEAN)]]

(* Initial state: all processes have state 0, all channels empty, no snapshots recorded *)
Init ==
  /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
  /\ channel = [i \in 1..N |-> [j \in 1..N |-> <<>>]]
  /\ snapshot = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]
  /\ marker = [i \in 1..N |-> [j \in 1..N |-> <<>>]]

(* Next action: processes can send data, receive data, or record snapshot *)
Next ==
  \/ \E i \in 1..N : \E j \in 1..N :
       /\ i # j
       /\ channel[i][j] = <<>> \implies
          /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![i][j] = Append(channel[i][j], 1)]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<state, snapshot, marker>>
       /\ channel[i][j] # <<>> \implies
          /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![i][j] = Tail(channel[i][j])]
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = state[i] + 1]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<snapshot, marker>>
       /\ snapshot[i] = FALSE \implies
          /\ snapshot' = [snapshot EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ marker' = [marker EXCEPT ![i][j] = Append(marker[i][j], TRUE) \* send marker on all outgoing channels]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<state, channel>>
       /\ snapshot[i] = TRUE \implies
          /\ UNCHANGED <<state, snapshot, channel, marker>>

Spec ==
  Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, channel, snapshot, marker>>

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS FiniteSubsets

VARIABLES token, messages

Init == /\ token \in 1..N
        /\ messages \in FiniteSubsets(1..N)

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ messages' \in FiniteSubsets(1..N)
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1
        /\ messages' = IF token' \in messages THEN messages \ {token'} ELSE messages

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token, messages>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values
VARIABLES store


(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
  /\ \A k \in Keys : store[k] \in Values

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
  /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
  /\ \A k \in Keys : store[k] = 0

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
  \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : 
        /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<>>
  \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : 
        /\ store' = store
        /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, CHUNK_ID, CHUNK_DATA, CHUNK_ACK, CHUNK_LOST
VARIABLES ackedChunks, retransmitCount, sentChunks, fileChunks

Init ==
    /\ fileChunks = [i \in 1..FILE_SIZE |-> CHUNK_DATA[i]]
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>
    /\ ackedChunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmitCount = [i \in 1..FILE_SIZE |-> 0]

Next ==
    \/ \E i \in 1..FILE_SIZE :
        /\ i \notin sentChunks
        /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, i)
        /\ \E acked \in {TRUE, FALSE} :
            /\ ackedChunks' = IF acked THEN Append(ackedChunks, i) ELSE ackedChunks
            /\ retransmitCount' = IF acked THEN [j \in 1..FILE_SIZE |-> IF j = i THEN 0 ELSE retransmitCount[j]] ELSE [j \in 1..FILE_SIZE |-> IF j = i THEN retransmitCount[j] + 1 ELSE retransmitCount[j]]
    \/ \E i \in 1..FILE_SIZE :
        /\ i \in sentChunks
        /\ i \notin ackedChunks
        /\ retransmitCount[i] < MAX_RETRIES
        /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
        /\ \E acked \in {TRUE, FALSE} :
            /\ ackedChunks' = IF acked THEN Append(ackedChunks, i) ELSE ackedChunks
            /\ retransmitCount' = IF acked THEN [j \in 1..FILE_SIZE |-> IF j = i THEN 0 ELSE retransmitCount[j]] ELSE [j \in 1..FILE_SIZE |-> IF j = i THEN retransmitCount[j] + 1 ELSE retransmitCount[j]]
    \/ \E i \in 1..FILE_SIZE :
        /\ i \in sentChunks
        /\ i \notin ackedChunks
        /\ retransmitCount[i] >= MAX_RETRIES
        /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
        /\ ackedChunks' = ackedChunks
        /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<fileChunks, sentChunks, ackedChunks, retransmitCount>>

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES clocks, offsets

Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ clocks[i] = clocks[i] + offsets[i]
        /\ offsets = [j \in 1..N |-> offsets[j] + (Avg(clocks) - clocks[j])]
        /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ clocks[i] = clocks[i] + offsets[i]
        /\ offsets = [j \in 1..N |-> offsets[j] + (Avg(clocks) - clocks[j])]

Avg(c) == Sum(c) \div Len(c)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, offsets>>

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ flag' = flag
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES known, infected

Init == /\ known = <<>> /\ infected = <<>> /\ Len(known) = Len(infected)

Next == /\ known' = known
      /\ infected' = infected \cup known

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Clients

VARIABLES free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

Next == /\ \E p \in Pages :
          /\ p \in free
          /\ free' = free \ {p}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {p}]
        \/ \E c \in Clients :
          /\ allocated[c] # {}
          /\ \E p \in allocated[c] :
              /\ free' = free \cup {p}
              /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {p}]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

TypeOK == /\ free \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in Clients : allocated[c] \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in Clients : IsFiniteSet(allocated[c])
          /\ \A c \in Clients : \A p \in allocated[c] : p \in Pages
          /\ \A c \in Clients : \A p \in allocated[c] : \A q \in allocated[c] : p = q
          /\ \A c1, c2 \in Clients : c1 # c2 => allocated[c1] \cap allocated[c2] = {}

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0,1}
        /\ wants \in {0,1} \cup {0,1} \cup {0,1} \cup {0,1}
        /\ \A i \in {0,1} : wants[i] = 0

Next == /\ turn' \in {0,1}
        /\ wants' \in {0,1} \cup {0,1} \cup {0,1} \cup {0,1}
        /\ \A i \in {0,1} : wants'[i] = wants[i]
        /\ \E i \in {0,1} : /\ wants[i] = 1
                           /\ turn = i
                           /\ wants'[i] = 0
                           /\ turn' = 1 - i
        \/ \E i \in {0,1} : /\ wants[i] = 1
                           /\ turn = 1 - i
                           /\ wants'[i] = 1
                           /\ turn' = turn
        \/ \E i \in {0,1} : /\ wants[i] = 0
                           /\ wants'[i] = 0
                           /\ turn' = turn

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

name: Eventually Consistent Counter

---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Node

VARIABLES counts


  (* --state Increment
  counts[n] = [m \in Node |-> IF m = n THEN counts[n][m] + 1 ELSE counts[n][m]]
  *)
  (* --state Merge
  counts = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> IF counts[n][m] > counts'[n][m] THEN counts[n][m] ELSE counts'[n][m]]]
  *)
  (* --state Total
  total = Sum(counts[][n])
  *)
end
*)

counts[n] = [m \in Node |-> IF m = n THEN counts[n][m] + 1 ELSE counts[n][m]]
*)

(* --state Merge
counts = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> IF counts[n][m] > counts'[n][m] THEN counts[n][m] ELSE counts'[n][m]]]
*)

(* --state Total
total = Sum(counts[][n])
*)

(* --state TypeOK
TypeOK == /\ counts \in [Node -> [Node -> Nat]]
*)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars
